title: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates emergency management activities and maintains a statewide emergency services system for emergency and disaster communications. Serves as the central agency for receiving reports of emergency incidents and for disseminating emergency-related information. OEM is made up of four sections including the Director’s Office, State 9-1-1 Program, Operations and Preparedness, and Mitigation and Recovery Services. 3930 Fairview Industrial Drive SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm On-call officer available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 378-2911 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-2911 Alternate (800) 452-0311 On-Call Duty Officer Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, some publications available in Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Preparedness Information State Offices of Emergency Services Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - LOCAL OFFICES OF EMERGENCY CONTACTS DISASTER SERVICES - OR-ALERT DISASTER SERVICES - STATE OF OREGON FLOOD DASHBOARD If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT
